body_transformation: Meowth's stocky muscular build retains its low stance and quadruped posture, now covered in deep crimson fur with molten gold fur patterns tracing its limbs and chest. The black-tipped ears and tail gain glowing ember-scaled textures along their edges, while the paw gloves transform into cracked obsidian plates with molten orange lava cracks. Facial markings shift to amber-hued smoldering embers, and the whiskers shimmer with heat-haze distortion as if radiating warmth.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold ember-scaled plating with glowing crimson fissures and smoke trails.
